meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve can't scale projects (Advanced Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome can't scale projects. A Advanced-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Antigravity Project Template: Scale Your Freelance SaaS Dev
content.seo_description: Stop struggling to scale. Use the Antigravity project template and Claude Code to automate architecture, improve delivery speed, and impress your clients.
content.answer_block: To scale freelance SaaS development, standardize your infrastructure with the Antigravity project template. By combining pre-configured architectural patterns with Claude Code’s autonomous reasoning, you eliminate repetitive boilerplate, enforce consistent code quality across projects, and dramatically reduce time-to-market for complex client deliverables, effectively turning your freelance work into a repeatable, high-margin machine.
content.intro:
You are staring at the abyss of technical debt, buried under the weight of three simultaneous client projects that refuse to scale. The promise of freelance freedom has curdled into a manual labor trap where every new feature feels like reinventing the wheel, and your velocity is throttled by the sheer overhead of setting up environments, auth flows, and database schemas from scratch.

But the architecture of your workflow is about to shift. By adopting the Antigravity project template, you move from manual craftsmanship to industrial-grade automation. This isn't just about faster typing; it's about shifting the cognitive load to an AI-orchestrated pipeline that ensures every project you ship is production-ready, modular, and infinitely scalable.

steps.title: Bootstrap Architecture with Antigravity
steps.description: Initialize your project using the template to enforce strict directory structures and standardized dependency management.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new SaaS project with modular architecture, including a standardized API layer, service-oriented business logic, and pre-configured PostgreSQL integration.

steps.title: Configure Schema-First Data Models
steps.description: Use the template's schema definitions to generate type-safe database models before writing a single line of business logic.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate Prisma models for a multi-tenant SaaS application with subscription management, user roles, and audit logging.

steps.title: Inject Business Logic via Claude Code
steps.description: Leverage Claude Code's context awareness to write domain-specific features while respecting the template's architectural boundaries.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Implement the core billing workflow using the Stripe API, ensuring all transactions are logged to the audit table defined in the schema.

steps.title: Automated Testing and Validation
steps.description: Run the template's built-in test suite to ensure that your new implementation hasn't regressed the base architecture.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Execute the full test suite and identify any potential bottlenecks in the API middleware layer.

steps.title: Deployment Pipeline Orchestration
steps.description: Finalize the infrastructure as code (IaC) files to prepare the project for high-availability deployment.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure the CI/CD pipeline for AWS deployment, including environment variable injection and secret management setup.

pro_tips: Always use a custom 'context-config.json' in your project root to force Claude Code to adhere to your specific coding standards every time.
Map your most frequent client requests to 'Antigravity Recipes'—pre-written prompt chains that generate CRUD modules in seconds.
Use Claude Code's '--watch' mode during development to automatically refactor code that drifts from the Antigravity template structure.
Keep your database migrations small and idempotent; large migrations are the leading cause of deployment failure in scaled freelance projects.
Leverage the template's 'mock-api' layer to demo functionality to clients before the backend is fully built, increasing perceived velocity.
content.next_steps: After mastering the template, focus on building your own custom library of 'Antigravity Recipes' to automate your specific niche requirements.
content.conversion_block: Stop fighting your own workflow and start building like an agency. The Antigravity template gives you the leverage you need to stop trading time for money and start scaling your impact. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
